chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-863 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of main case. 07.02.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr.Zaheem Haider, Advocate for Respondent No.3. Mr.Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Advocate for Respondent No.4. As per prayer clause 1 Sindh Ordinance No.XX/1993 is to be struck down. When confronted, as to what provision of the Constitution it allegedly offends, the petitioner appearing in person remains unable to assist. The petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge Judge nasir
